results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
FOMC Meeting 2026 Highlights: Fed Interest Rates Stays 3.75%

summary: FOMC voted 8-4 to hold fed funds rate at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026 — third consecutive hold. Powell's last meeting as chair (term ends May 15). Markets pricing no cuts rest of 2026 and into 2027. Inflation elevated partly due to global energy prices.
